clauses.statement: Release-surface classification is deterministic code: raw gh pr create/merge, protected-branch git push, and deploy commands match; routine commands and vibepro's own commands never match.
When a release-surface command is checked while the selected story is not ready_for_pr_create, the guard exits non-zero and reports blocking gates and recovery commands.
When the bypass environment variable carries a non-empty reason, the guard allows the command and appends an audit record.
When the selected story is ready_for_pr_create the guard allows release-surface commands.
When the repository has no VibePro workspace or the guard is disabled, every command is allowed untouched.

guard install writes a marker-managed idempotent pre-push hook, refuses to overwrite foreign hooks, and the hook delegates only protected-branch refs; guard uninstall removes only vibepro-managed hooks.

guard install --claude merges a Bash-matcher PreToolUse hook into .claude/settings.json preserving existing keys, is idempotent, and the pretooluse mode extracts the tool command from stdin JSON and blocks with exit 2 plus stderr reason.
The guard key in .vibepro/config.json controls enablement, protected branches, and extra release patterns, and guard status reports hook state, configuration, and bypass record count.

diagrams.title: Guard check decision workflow process
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Cmd["command (pre-push / PreToolUse / --command)"] --> Classify["release-surface pattern classify"]
  Classify -->|no match| Allow["allow (exit 0)"]
  Classify -->|match| Readiness["evaluate gate readiness"]
  Readiness -->|ready_for_pr_create| Allow
  Readiness -->|blocked| Bypass{"VIBEPRO_GUARD_BYPASS?"}
  Bypass -->|non-empty reason| Log["append bypass-log.jsonl"] --> Allow
  Bypass -->|none| Block["block (exit 2 + blocking gates)"]

diagrams.title: Guard decision state transitions
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> checked
  checked --> allow: no release surface match / workspace absent / disabled / ready
  checked --> block: matched and story not ready, no bypass reason
  checked --> bypass: matched, not ready, non-empty recorded reason
  block --> bypass: operator sets recorded reason
  bypass --> [*]
  allow --> [*]

diagrams.title: Advisory bypass threat and control
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Agent["coding agent"] -->|raw gh pr create / git push main / deploy| Surface["release surface"]
  Threat["blocked state ignored (2026-07-13 incident)"] --> Surface
  Surface --> Hook["pre-push hook / PreToolUse hook"]
  Hook --> Check["vibepro guard check (deterministic)"]
  Check -->|blocked| Stop["exit code stops the command"]
  Check -->|bypass with reason| Audit["bypass-log.jsonl audit trail"]
